examples: there was a question about my training
we made inquiries of all those who were present
the question of disease merits serious discussion
under the head of minor Roman poets

meanings.definition: a sentence of inquiry that asks for a reply
examples: he had trouble phrasing his interrogations

meanings.definition: uncertainty about the truth or factuality or existence of something
examples: there is no question about the validity of the enterprise

meanings.definition: a formal proposal for action made to a deliberative assembly for discussion and vote
examples: he made a motion to adjourn

meanings.definition: an informal reference to a marriage proposal
examples: he was ready to pop the question

meanings.definition: challenge the accuracy, probity, or propriety of
examples: We must question your judgment in this matter

meanings.definition: pose a series of questions to
examples: The suspect was questioned by the police
We questioned the survivor about the details of the explosion

meanings.definition: conduct an interview in television, newspaper, and radio reporting
place in doubt or express doubtful speculation
examples: I wonder whether this was the right thing to do
she wondered whether it would snow tonight
